name: HeroicGamesLauncher
description: A games launcher for GOG, Amazon and Epic Games for Linux, Windows and macOS.
readme_summary: Heroic Games Launcher is an open-source game launcher that allows users to manage and play games from multiple digital storefronts including Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games. It supports Linux, Windows, and macOS, leveraging web technologies for its development.
key_features: Supports Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games.
Built with web technologies (TypeScript, React, Electron).
Utilizes external tools like Legendary, gogdl, and Nile for game management.
primary_use_case: To provide a unified and open-source game launcher for users to access and play games from various digital distribution platforms on their desktop operating systems.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a central, ornate game controller acting as a universal key. This key is shown unlocking multiple distinct doors, each subtly representing the Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games logos. From these doors, streams of colorful game icons and digital light flow towards the controller, symbolizing unified access. In the background, a stylized world map with glowing connection points highlights cross-platform compatibility. Small, subtle UI elements resembling a clean game library interface are integrated into the scene. The overall aesthetic is a 3D isometric illustration with a bright, inviting color palette, emphasizing ease of use and comprehensive game access. The repository name 'Heroic Games Launcher' is subtly etched onto the controller.

name: folio
description: Modern PDF library for Go: layout engine, HTML to PDF, forms, signatures, barcodes, and PDF/A. Apache 2.0.
readme_summary: Folio is a modern PDF generation library for Go, offering a comprehensive suite of features including a layout engine, HTML to PDF conversion, form creation, digital signatures, barcode generation, and PDF/A compliance. It aims to provide a fast and efficient way to create complex PDF documents directly within Go applications without external dependencies like browsers.
key_features: Layout engine for programmatic PDF creation
Fast HTML to PDF conversion (no Chrome/Puppeteer needed)
Support for 40+ HTML elements, CSS (including flexbox, grid), SVG
primary_use_case: Generating sophisticated PDF documents programmatically within Go applications, including converting HTML content to PDF, creating reports, invoices, and documents with advanced features like forms, signatures, and barcodes.
cover_image_prompt: A master artisan in a bustling, modern workshop, meticulously crafting intricate paper sculptures. One hand holds a glowing blueprint (representing HTML code), which is being fed into a magical loom. The loom weaves the blueprint into a perfectly formed, elegant PDF document that floats gracefully into a display case. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets drift in the air around the workshop, hinting at the underlying technology. The overall mood is one of precision, creativity, and efficient transformation. The style should be a vibrant 3D isometric illustration with clear lighting and a focus on the transformation process.

name: planning-with-files
description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition.
readme_summary: This Python repository implements a Claude Code skill that enables persistent markdown planning, inspired by the Manus workflow pattern. It allows users to manage projects and tasks through structured markdown files, facilitating a more organized and efficient development process.
key_features: Claude Code skill for persistent markdown planning
Project and task management via markdown files
Support for various IDE hooks and agent integrations
primary_use_case: To provide a structured and persistent planning system for AI agents and developers using markdown files, mimicking the successful workflow of Manus.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect, embodying the 'Planning with Files' skill, stands in a futuristic workshop. They are meticulously arranging glowing, translucent blueprint fragments (representing markdown files) onto a holographic table. Each fragment snaps into place, forming a complex, evolving structure of a digital city. Small, animated data streams flow between the fragments, symbolizing the AI's understanding and organization. In the background, subtle UI elements show task progress and code snippets. The overall mood is one of organized creation and intelligent design, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, tech-inspired color palette.

name: maptoposter
description: Transform your favorite cities into beautiful, minimalist designs. MapToPoster lets you create and export visually striking map posters with code.
readme_summary: MapToPoster is a Python script that generates minimalist map posters of cities. It leverages OpenStreetMap data and Matplotlib to create customizable visual designs based on various themes and user-defined parameters.
key_features: Support for uv and pip installation
primary_use_case: Creating personalized, aesthetically pleasing map posters of any city in the world using code.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, minimalist map of a city being meticulously crafted by a digital artisan. Imagine a glowing, ethereal hand holding a brush made of light, painting intricate street patterns onto a dark canvas. The input is represented by a faint, abstract globe in the background, while the output is a beautifully rendered, minimalist city map poster emerging from the canvas. Subtle code snippets and data streams flow around the artisan's hands, hinting at the generative process. The overall mood is creative and sophisticated, with a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing accents. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a focus on the transformation from data to art.
